stories.title: Sights, sounds and more second-round moments
stories.summary: Here is the best of the action from Friday at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Turner: No fines from Rivers; Giannis always late
stories.summary: Bucks center Myles Turner said on his podcast that former coach Doc Rivers "didn't fine anybody ever" and that Giannis Antetokounmpo would "show up whenever he wants."

stories.title: Top-10 7-foot junior Hill commits to Boilermakers
stories.summary: Top-10 junior Isaiah Hill committed to Purdue on Friday, becoming the highest-ranked prospect to commit to the Boilermakers since the ESPN recruiting database began in 2007.

stories.title: Rahm apologizes for 'inexcusable' incident at PGA
stories.summary: Jon Rahm apologized for hitting a volunteer in the face and shoulder with a divot after he took a swing in frustration during the first round of the PGA Championship on Thursday.

stories.title: Deion: Shedeur endured 'hell' in draft, rookie yea...
stories.summary: Deion Sanders said that his son Shedeur "matured spiritually" after enduring criticism and what he called untruthful reporting during his predraft process and rookie season with the Browns.
